alkylation reagent: incubation with 45 μl of freshly prepared 200 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: incubation with 45 μl of freshly prepared 200 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: 10 μl trypsin (Promega, V5117) was added (1 μg in total)
enrichment method: mixed with 100 μl streptavidin agarose beads (Thermo Scientific, 20353)
fractionation method: by on-tip high pH fractionation each with different ACN dilution
fragmentation method: the collision-induced dissociation (CID) fragmentation technique was used
instrument: Mass spectrometry analysis was performed on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled to a Dionex Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano system (Thermo Fisher Scientific) via a Nanospray Flex Ion Source
labeling: the acquired raw data files were processed using the Proteome Discoverer v.2.4.1.15 platform, with a TMT16plex quantification method selected
reduction reagent: 30 μl of 50 mM TCEP (Sigma-Aldrich, 75259-1G; final concentration 4.5 mM)
reduction concentration: 30 μl of 50 mM TCEP (Sigma-Aldrich, 75259-1G; final concentration 4.5 mM)
